calendar.matters:
Petition To Reform Trust Due To Drafting Mistake
Off Calendar Jul-28-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jodi Phillips appeared by zoom for and with Chris Merrill (Petitioner) by zoom.

The Court stated that it is satisfied that this is an appropriate action to take. The court granted the Petition to Reform Trust Due to Drafting Mistake (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
